# OpenPlan3D

> Free, open-source 2D & 3D floor plan editor that runs in your browser.

## What it does
- Draw floor plans in 2D with walls, doors, windows, and dimensions
- Visualize designs in real-time 3D
- Place 140+ furniture models from a built-in library
- Import Apple RoomPlan scans (iPhone/iPad LiDAR)
- Import 3D mesh models (GLB/glTF)
- Export to PNG, SVG, DXF, PDF, JSON
- Imperial and metric unit support

## OpenPlan3D Capture (iOS app)
- Free, open-source iPhone/iPad app for scanning rooms into editable floor plans
- Uses LiDAR and Apple RoomPlan to detect walls, doors, windows, and furniture automatically
- Fine-tune walls with live dimensions, view the space in 3D
- Open a scan directly in the OpenPlan3D web editor, or export to PNG, SVG, DXF, PDF, or USDZ
- No account required; scans stay on the device
- Status: coming soon to the App Store
- Details: https://www.openplan3d.com/capture

## Key facts
- Completely free — no premium tier, no paywalls, no signup required
- Open source: https://github.com/theLodgeBots/open3dFloorplan
- Web app: https://app.openplan3d.com
- Built with SvelteKit and Three.js

## Links
- Website: https://www.openplan3d.com
- Editor: https://app.openplan3d.com
- iPhone app: https://www.openplan3d.com/capture
- GitHub: https://github.com/theLodgeBots/open3dFloorplan
